pump_exterior.text: A squat concrete building sits half-submerged at the edge of the flooded district, a rusted hatch above the waterline still sealed. Old piping runs in and out of the walls. A diesel generator sits dry on a raised concrete pad — and miraculously, the fuel gauge reads a quarter tank.

choices.label: Force the hatch and go in dark.

pump_interior.text: The interior is dim and clammy. Pump housings the size of barrels line the walls, most seized with rust. A wall-mounted cabinet is padlocked but the hinges have corroded through. Inside: service tools, a small fuel can, and a sealed box of water purification tablets.

fuel_drained.text: You siphon every drop from the tank into your containers. The generator coughs once and goes cold. In the now-silent building you hear slow dripping and little else. You leave through the hatch and drop into the grey water below, heavier than you arrived.

generator_backfire.text: The engine turns over then kicks back through the pull-cord, wrenching your shoulder hard. The cord snaps and whips across your forearm.

hatch_gas.text: A pocket of foul gas hits you as the hatch opens. You hold your breath but the dizziness doesn't leave for an hour.

fuel_spill.text: The coupling bursts under pressure and fuel sprays across the floor. One spark and this building becomes a fireball. You run. The generator and its remaining fuel burn behind you as you hit the water.
